usage: fix_boundary_overlaps [-help] [-fix_area {x1 y1 x2 y2}] [-groups {string1 string2 ...}] [-hinsts {string1 string2 ...}] [-move_area {x1 y1 x2 y2}]

options.name: -fix_area
options.description: Specifies the coordinates of the area in which overlap needs to be resolved.

options.name: -groups
options.description: Specifies the prefixed group names. Use this parameter if you want to resolve overlaps between only specified groups.

options.name: -hinsts
options.description: Specifies the prefixed hinst names. Use this parameter if you want to resolve overlaps between only specified hinsts.
